message:
refactor(web): extract server lifecycle to web/server.rs [ft-1zej2]

Move start_web_server, run_web_server, wait_for_shutdown_signal,
handle_server_exit, and poke_listener to dedicated server.rs submodule.
Re-export public functions to preserve external API compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
